name: chain_i_built_a_digital_product_last_saturday_
method:
i built a digital product last saturday morning and it made $1,100 by sunday night

not because it was good. because it was specific.

here's exactly what i did hour by hour:

9am: opened facebook gro

stages.task: Mine Facebook groups + Reddit for repeated specific pain points across faith/fitness/tech niches
Cluster by frequency, score specificity (reject vague), rank top 3 product opportunities
Generate hyper-specific digital product (PDF/template/checklist) using Claude for top-ranked opportunity
Create marketplace listing with pain-point-matched copy, set price $9-27
Post solution back to source communities + content queue
